questions.scenario: A team has one simple HTTP container and no Kubernetes policies, operators, or shared cluster platform. What should they consider before GKE?

options.text: Cloud Run, because a container alone is not a Kubernetes requirement.
A function with every HTTP route.

questions.explanation: Cloud Run can run containers with much less platform surface when Kubernetes is not needed.

questions.scenario: The organization needs Kubernetes operators, policy controllers, sidecars, and a shared deployment model across many services. Which runtime is now a strong fit?
Which are strong reasons to choose GKE?

options.text: Kubernetes APIs and policy are part of the platform.
The team needs operators or sidecars that are already Kubernetes-native.
The organization has a real shared cluster operating model.
The app has a container image and nothing else.

questions.explanation: GKE is justified by Kubernetes-shaped requirements, not by containers alone.
